name: Michelle Lopez
notes: Hi, we have been following Eric for a while. Love his YouTube channel. We have taken other 5 day challenges. Yet, we still need much help with learning how to properly do federal contracting. Also, we are interested in the subcontracting and we do own a plumbing, hvac and remodeling services business here in the state of Illinois. Look forward to speaking to Eric or his team and finding out a bit more about his course or mentorship. Thank you!
